sellers_note: Discover the exceptional capabilities of this 2016 Ford F-150 XLT SuperCrew 4X4 5'6 Bed. Boasting a powerful 2.7L V6 EcoBoost engine and 4-wheel drive, this truck is ready to tackle any terrain with confidence. - Inflatable rear safety belts - Equipment Group 302A Luxury package - XLT Chrome Appearance package - FX4 Off-Road package - Trailer Tow package This well-equipped F-150 offers a host of premium features, including a twin-panel moonroof, power-sliding rear window, heated front seats, and a SYNC 3 infotainment system with an 8-inch touchscreen. The Trailer Tow package adds towing capability up to 11,100 lbs, making this truck a true workhorse. The exterior showcases a bold, athletic style with chrome accents, a billet-style grille, and 20-inch chrome-like wheels. Step bars and LED box lighting provide both style and functionality. Inside, the cabin is thoughtfully designed with premium cloth seating, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, and ample storage space. Whether you're hauling gear, towing a trailer, or exploring off-road, this 2016 Ford F-150 XLT is ready to take on the challenge. Experience the power and capability that make this truck a standout in its class. Schedule a test drive today and discover why this F-150 is the perfect fit for your next adventure.
